name: json_query
description: Executes jq filter expressions against JSON input, returning structured result arrays with optional truncation, compact output, and raw string extraction. Supports stdin input for agent-safe data pipelining.

primary.note: Lightweight JSON processor. Supports complex filter expressions, array/object traversal, and string interpolation.

dependencies.name: node
dependencies.note: Required to execute the normalization pipeline that parses jq output into structured JSON.

fallback.note: Python json module. Reduced fidelity — jq filter expressions are unavailable; fallback returns input JSON unmodified.

input.description: JSON string to feed via stdin. If omitted or empty, jq reads from stdin (agent must provide via runtime).

compact.description: Output compact JSON (one result per line, NDJSON). Recommended for objects and arrays to ensure reliable pipeline parsing.

raw_output.description: Output raw strings instead of JSON-encoded values.

slurp.description: Read all input values into an array before applying the filter.

max_results.description: Hard upper bound on total results returned. Enforced in the normalisation pipeline.

truncated.description: True if max_results was reached before all results were returned.

results.description: Array of JSON values produced by the jq query.

used_fallback.description: True if python3 fallback was invoked instead of jq.
True if python3 fallback was attempted and also failed.

execution.note: JSON input is fed to jq via stdin when the 'input' field is provided. The Transcend runtime pipes the input string directly into jq's stdin stream.

pipeline.description: Parse jq output into a flat array of result objects. Handles both compact NDJSON and pretty-printed JSON output.

pipeline.action: Slice results array to max_results entries.
pipeline.description: Enforce global result limit to preserve token budget.
Build final success envelope with results array and metadata.

output_gaps: jq filter expressions are unavailable; fallback returns input JSON unmodified

compatible_downstream.description: Pass extracted file paths or content identifiers to file_read.

compatible_upstream.description: Pipe search results as JSON input for structured extraction.
Feed codebase metrics as JSON input for filtering and aggregation.
